meaning: vt.使极度痛苦,折磨vi.感到极度痛苦
examples: As a mother, I agonize over what my children will inherit.
If you're anything like me you'll agonize over what to write in the CARDS.
I agonize over my columns and website to avoid adding to the burden of guilt.
Social programs struggle (and agonize) over the balance of expert opinion, scientific evidence, and client perspectives.
Some people would agonize over the decision to give up a thriving career and move out to the boondocks.
